destinations.evidence: Compact helper struct mirrors current TxScheduled metadata and to/from_compact maps all listed fields, with empty spc_calls restored to None.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port: TxScheduled compact encoding/decoding preserves current scheduled metadata including ttl and optional async/SPC fields.
rationale: The packet candidate names max_block, but the current codec evidence shows ttl/expiry-derived metadata instead; the refined invariant tracks the current struct fields present at repository tip.
statement: Compact serialization for TxScheduled must round-trip the current scheduled metadata fields, including gas, EIP-1559 fees, target, value, input, origin_tx, call_id, index, initial_block, frequency, ttl, caller, optional async linkage hashes, and spc_calls.
suggested_falsification_tests: Compact round-trip a TxScheduled with non-default origin/call/index/frequency/ttl/caller/commitment/settlement/spc_calls and assert equality.
summary: Scheduled compact codecs preserve current metadata.
test_or_falsification_candidate: The generated compact arbitrary tests plus a hand-written optional-field round-trip should catch metadata loss.
title: Scheduled transaction compact codecs preserve current metadata
